resources.string: Bayar da Dama ga Sanarwowin Kiran Waya
Bayar da Dama ga Sanarwowin SMS
A lokacin gudanar tanadin, da fatar a bar na\'urar a haɗe yadda aka saba, kada ayi amfani da keɓantaccen fitaccen-wuri, kuma a bar Wi-Fi a kunne. Duba yanayin na\'urorin sannan a gwada kuma.
Tanadin Gidan Hotuna na AI na na\'urar \"%1$s\" bai kammala ba. A yanke haɗin na\'ura?
Tanadi na gudana… (%1$s / %2$s)
Soke
Tanadin Gidan Hotuna na AI
An soke tanadin Gidan Hotuna na AI
An kasa tanadin Gidan Hotuna na AI
An ƙare tanadin Gidan Hotuna na AI
An daƙile tanadin Gidan Hotuna na AI
Tanadin Gidan Hotuna na AI yayi nasara
Yanke
YAYI
Lura
Soke
Ba za\'a iya yin amfani da fasalin %2$s yadda ya kamat ba. Da fatar a ziyarci %3$s (kwafe sannan manne) akan kwamfutar ku don saukar da mafi sabuwar sigar mai raɓar %1$s.
Kwafi Mahaɗa
Sigar %1$s daɗaɗɗiya ce
Nuna bidiyoyin waya akan kwamfutar ku, don kada ku rasa kowane bayani.
Zaɓi %1$s akan Kwamfutar ku don fitowa da Lambar-sirri ta QR.
Yi sikanin Lambar-sirri ta QR
Sanar da Zarar an haɗa
Da fatar za\'a kunna Wi-Fi da Bulutoot ɗin a kan kwamfutar da kuke son ku haɗa, kuma buɗe abokin-hulɗar Kwamfutar. Zaku iya ziyartar %1$s don saukar da abokin-hulɗar.

Kunna Wi-Fi da Bulutoot akan Kwamfutar. Bayan haɗawa, zaku iya gabatar da allon wayar ku a wata na\'ura ko yin taransifar fayiloli. Domin kwamfutocin Infinix, Infinix Haɗin Kwamfuta da aka shigar a farko tare da wata hanyar gaggawa akan fuska-kwamfuta. Domin Kwamfutocin waɗansu samfurorin, ziyarci %1$s don saukar da abokin-hulɗar Kwamfuta cikin sauƙi.

Kunna Wi-Fi da Bulutoot akan Kwamfutar. Bayan haɗawa, zaku iya gabatar da allon wayar ku a wata na\'ura ko yin taransifar fayiloli. Domin kwamfutocin TECNO, PC Manager ko OneLeap da aka shigar a farko tare da wata hanyar gaggawa akan fuska-kwamfuta. Domin Kwamfutocin waɗansu samfurorin, ziyarci %1$s don saukar da abokin-hulɗar Kwamfuta cikin sauƙi.
An kasa haɗawa. Da fatar za\'a sake gwadawa ta hanyar kebur ɗin USB.
Shiryawa kafin Haɗawa
Haɗa tare da Kebur ɗin Data
1. Yi amfani da ingantaccen kebur ɗin data don haɗa na\'urar wayar hannu da kwamfuta.\n2. Zaɓi %1$s a cikin taga mai bijirowa.
Dis
Haɗin Na\'ura
Yaɗa allo & Yi taransifa
Na samu
Don samun abokin-hulɗa mafi sabunta, zaku iya ziyartar %2$s akan Kwamfutar ku.
Sarrafa Fane/Tagogi da Yawa Ba Tare Da Wahala ba, Babu Buƙatar a Ɗauki Wayar
Sarrafa Tagogi da Yawa Ba Tare Da Wahala ba, Babu Buƙatar a Ɗauki Wayar

Kunna Wi-Fi da Bulutoot akan Kwamfutar, sannan ƙaddamar da Mai Gudanar da Kwamfuta One Leap akan kwamfutocin TECNO. Domin kwamfutocin wani-na-daban zaku iya saukar da abokin-ciniki cikin gaggawa a www.pcconnection.online.
Ƙaramin Nuna Kwamfuta
Fab
Yaɗa fayil ta Janyo-sannan-Ajiye yana ɗauke tare da dai-daitaccen kilifbod ga duka-na\'ura.
Taransifar Fayil Da Sauri
Riƙe sannan janyo wani fayil don yin taransifar shi tsakanin wayar ku da Kwanfutar ku.\n*Akan wayoyi, akwai wannan fasalin ga Gidan Hotuna na AI da Manajar Fayil.
Janyo don yin Taransifa
Yaɗa allon aikace-aikace da yawa a lokaci guda, dun haka kuna iya, alal misali, yin catin a lokacin kallon bidiyoyi.\n*Kawai akwai shine akan wasu Kwamfutoci.
Tagogi Domin Aikace-aikace Da Yawa
Gaba
Hotunan-allo ko hotunan da kuka ɗauka da wayar ku za\'a dai-daita su da Kwamfutar ku.
Za\'a dai-daita aiki akan wayar da na Kwamfutar ku, don kaucewa mai-maitattun matakai.
Dai-daita Nan-take
Fara yin Amfani
Zaɓi wani fayil sannan shafa zuwa dama da yatus 3 don yin taransifa shi zuwa kwamfutar ku cikin sauƙi da gaggawa.\n*Akan wayoyi, akwai wannan fasalin ga Gidan Hotuna na AI da Manajar Fayil.
Gusarwa da Sauri na Kwamfuta
Za\'a iya manne rubutun da kuka kwafe daga wayar kai-tsaye aka Kwamfutar ku.
Kwafe & Manne tsakanin-na\'urori
Nuna wayar ku akan allon wata kwamfuta ko kwamfutar hannu sai ku mori nishaɗin kwafe-manne a tsakanin-na\'urori, taransifar fayil, da tanadi a sauƙaƙe domin aiki cikin sauƙi da nishaɗi.
Janairu
Nishaɗantu da Bidiyoyin Waya akan Allo Mai Girma
Duka Na\'urori
Na\'urorin da Za\'a Iya Sake Yiwa Caji
Zaɓi na\'urorin da za su iya nemo wannan na\'urar.
Haɗa da Na\'urori
Haɗa-Allo da Yawa ya na aiki yanzu haka da %1$s.
An haɗa %1$s
An haɗa
Na\'urorin da Aka Haɗa
An kwafe
An kasa kwafewa
Anyi nasarar kwafewa
Ana kwafewa… %1$s
Kwafewa da Yatsu-uku
Nuna allon wayar ku akan wata kwamfutar hannu domin kallo a ƙaton-allo. Za ku iya cigaba da yin amfani da wayar ku ba tare da kun daƙile faslin nuna akan wani allo ba.

Nuna wayar ku akan allon wata kwamfuta ko kwamfutar hannu sai ku mori nishaɗin kwafe-manne a tsakanin-na\'urori, taransifar fayil, da tanadi a sauƙaƙe domin aiki cikin sauƙi da nishaɗi. Domin cikakken bayani, koma ga %1$s.
Nuna bidiyoyin waya akan kwamfutar ku, don kada ku rasa kowane bayani.
Yin amfani Tagogin Manhaja da Yawa don yin catin akan WhatsApp a lokacin buga-wasa.
Janyowa da ajiyewa fayiloli cikin sauƙi don yin taransifar. Kwafe abu akan ɗayar na\'urar sannan manne shi akan wata.
Duba abubuwan waya akan wani babban allo sannan sarrafa wayar ku kai-tsaye daga kwamfutar hannun.
Da zarar an haɗa wayar da kwamfutar hannu ɗin ku, za ku iya kwafe da manne rubutu a tsakanin su. \nKwafe abu akan ɗayar na\'urar sannan manne shi nan-take akan waccan.
Fasullan Haɗawa A Tsakani
An Fahimta
Motsin Nunawa a Wata Na\'ura & na Taransifa
Haɗa-Allo da Yawa
Haɗin-Allo da Yawa
Tukunna babu amintattun na\'urorin da aka ƙara
Kwafe da Manne Tsakanin-Na\'urori
Faɗaɗa Allo Waya
Faɗaɗa Allo
Kunna Faɗaɗa Allon Waya domin ƙayataccen dubi akan babban allo. Aiwatar da waɗansu ayyuka akan wayar ba zai daƙile allon da aka faɗaɗa ba.
Haɗa-Na\'ura da Yawa > Haɗa-Allo da Yawa
Nuna da faɗaɗa allo zuwa wata na\'ura, yaɗa bayanai, dss. a tsakanin waya da kwamfutar hannu ko kwamfutar ku.
Yaɗa Kiraye-kiraye Masu Shigowa
Za ku iya amsa da yin kiraye-kiraye akan kwamfuta ko kwamfutar hannu ɗinku a yayin da wayar ke karɓar wani kira.
Raba Cibiyar Sadarwa
Raba Sanarwowi
Yaɗa SMS
Za ku iya duba da mayar da martanin saƙonni daga wayar ku akan kwamfuta ko kwamfutar hannu ɗinku.
Yaɗa zuwa %1$s
Gwada Yanzu
An kasa aikawa
Anyi nasarar aikawa
Kwafe da manne rubutu, hotuna, da wasu ƙari a tsakanin na\'urori.
Shafa zuwa Dama da Yatsu 3 don Aika Zaɓaɓɓun Fayiloli
Yi taransifar hotuna, bidiyoyi, fayiloli da wasu ƙari zuwa kwamfutar ku. Yi taransifar manyan fayiloli ba tare da yin amfani da data ba.
Taɓa Sau-biyu tare da Yatsu 3 don Kwafewa akan Kilifbod ɗin Kwamfuta
Kwafe hotuna, bidiyoyi, fayiloli, da wasu ƙarin akan kilifbod ɗin kwamfuta domin mannewa a tsakanin-na\'urori salun-alun akan kwamfutar da aka haɗe.
Karɓa, duba, sannan sarrafa sanarwowin waya kai-tsaye akan kwamfutar ko kwamfutar hannu ɗin ku domin sauƙaƙaƙƙun faɗakarwowi a tsakanin-na\'urori.
Bayar da dama ga na\'urorin da aka haɗa su yi amfani da datar waya ta cibiyar sadarwar wannan wayar.
Gaggawar sabbaba nunawa akan wani allo, kwafewa a tsakanin-na\'urori, taransifar fayil, da wasu ƙarin ta hanyar yin amfani da sarrafe-sarrafen motsi.
Tsungula sannan Shafa da Yatsu 3 don Gaggawar Fara Nunawa Akan Wani Allo
Gaggawar nuna allon wayar ku akan allon kwamfutar ta hanyar yin amfani da sarrafe-sarrafen motsi.
Aika zuwa %1$s
Ana aikawa… %1$s
Amintattun Na\'urori Kawai
Amintattun Na\'urori
Amintattun na\'urori da na\'urorin da aka shiga cikin asusu ɗaya da su
A cire %1$s daga cikin amintattun na\'urori?
Babu buƙatar a sake tambayawa a yayin haɗawa da wannan na\'urar.
Jagoran Mai Amfani
Nuna wayar akan Kwamfuta domin gani aka allo mai girma da kuma gaggawar taransifar fayil ba tare da data ba. Ana buƙatar amincewa da izinoni masu zuwa, waɗanda kawai domin aikin da ake buƙata ne.
Na yarda
Sami Damar Sanarwa
Kawai anyi amfani ne don dai-daita sanarwowi daga wayar ku zuwa Kwamfutar ku, ba don ɗora su akan sabar ba.
Za ka iya kofin hotuna, bidiyoyi, da rubutu, sauransu zuwa ga allon-latsawa na kwamfutarka da liƙa su kai tsaye daga kwamfutarka.
Za ka iya kofin hotuna, bidiyoyi, da sauran wasu fayiloli zuwa ga allon-latsawa na kwamfutarka da liƙa su kai tsaye daga kwamfutarka.
Taɓa sau biyu tare da Yatsu 3 don Kofi zuwa ga Allon-latsawa na Kwamfutar
Gusarwa da Sauri na Kwamfuta
Za ka iya gusar da hotuna, bidiyoyi, fayiloli, da sauransu daga wayarka zuwa ga kwamfutarka. Haka kuma, za ka iya buɗe taga haɗa midiya na wayar a kan kwamfutarka.
Za ka iya gusar da hotuna, bidiyoyi, fayiloli, da sauransu daga kwamfutarka. Gusarwa bayanai kyauta mai sauri ta manyan fayiloli yana da kuma da tallafi.
Zame Dama tare da Yatsu 3 don Gusar da Fayiloli da aka Zaɓa
Za ka iya gusar da hotuna, bidiyoyi, da sauransu daga wayarka zuwa ga kwamfutarka tare da daƙuwa. Gusarwa bayanai kyauta mai sauri ta manyan fayiloli yana da kuma da tallafi.
Ana fara haɗa midiya...
Duba mana matsayin haɗin a kan kwamfutarka
Kashe mana Fitaccen-wuri kuma ka haɗa
Haɗin Kwamfuta
An kasa haɗawa da na\'ura
Buɗe shafin lambar-sirri ta QR a kan kwamfutar.
Yi sikanin lambar-sirri ta QR don ka haɗa.
An kasa haɗawa
Lokacin haɗin ya ƙare. Tabbata mana an saka %1$s a kan kwamfutarka.
Ajiye wayarka kusa da kwamfutarka.
Tabbata Bluetooth da Wi-Fi an aiwatar a kan kwamfutarka.
Tabbata Bluetooth da Wi-Fi an aiwatar a kan wayarka.
Jiran
An haɗa zuwa kwamfuta
An ƙare lokacin haɗi
Ana Jonawa…..
ƙi amincewa
\"%1$s\" ta ƙi haɗin zuwa ga wayar. Sake haɗawa mana.
Ana cire haɗi ...
Ƙaramin Nuna Kwamfuta
Ana a hade
An kofi hanyar haɗin da aka raba zuwa ga allon-latsawa.
\"%1$s\" ta ƙi amfani da %2$s
Aikin tsawaita allon kwamfuta
Za ka iya amfani da wayarka a matsayin wani tsawaitaccen allo don kwamfutarka ta sami wata ƙwarewar aiki mai inganci a kan alluna da yawa.

Yi amfani da wayarka a matsayin wani miƙeƙƙen allo don kwamfutarka ta sami wata ƙwarewar aiki mai inganci a kan alluna da yawa. Tabbata mana an aiwatar da Bluetooth da Wi-Fi a kan duk wayarka da kwamfutarka. Wannan aikin ba ya cin kowane bayanai.
An gaza gusarwa fayil
Ana layi, ana dab da gusarwa...
Kyauta ba bayanai
Bayan haɗi, za ka iya amfani da fasalan haɗin gwiwa na na\'ura da yawa kamar Madubin Allo da Gusar da Fayil.
Fitar da %1$s kuma ka sake gwadawa
Ana haɗa midiya...
Fitar da %1$s kuma ka sake gwadawa
Yi amfani da daƙuwa don ƙyale duba allo da sauri zuwa ga kwamfutar.
Matse Ciki ka kuma Zame Dama tare da Yatsu 3 don Aiwatar da Haɗa Dubawa da Sauri
Matse ciki kuma ka zame tare da yatsu 3 don yin madubin allon wayar zuwa ga kwamfutar.
Daƙuwar Madubin Kwamfuta
Za ka iya ziyartar %1$s a kan kwamfutarka don samun abokin ciniki mafi sabo
An kofi hanyar haɗin zuwa ga Allon Rubutu
Ba da Dama ta Duk Izini
Haɗin NFC
Ajiye wayar a kan guntun NFC na kwamfutar da ke tallafin wannan fasalin don ka haɗa.\nDuba mana idani wayar tana tallafin NFC da farko.
Shiryawa kafin Haɗi
Don haɗa wata na\'ura ta amfani da %1$s, kana da buƙatar buɗe abokin cinikin kwamfuta, kuma tabbata an aaiwatar da Wi-Fi da Bluetooth a kan wayar da kwamfutar, kuma bar allon a kunne kuma buɗe.
Don samin abokin ciniki mafi sabo, za ka iya ziyartar %1$s a kan kwamfutarka.
Haɗi ta Lambar-sirri ta QR

1. Taɓa Sikan don Haɗi a kan abokin cinikin kwamfutar don fito da lambar-sirri ta QR ɗin.\n2. Zame ƙasa daga gefen saman dama na allon wayar don samun damar Cibiyar Sarrafa, yi dogon danna Haɗin Kwamfuta don ka tsallaka zuwa shafin Haɗin Kwamfuta, kuma taɓa maɓallin Sikan a cikin kusurwar saman dama don sikanin Lambar-sirri ta QR don ka haɗa.
Haɗi Marar Waya

1. Zame ƙasa daga gefen dama na saman wayar don samun damar Cibiyar Sarrafa da zaɓin Haɗin Kwamfuta.\n2. Zaɓi na\'urar da kake son ka haɗa zuwa ga taga mai fitowa ta ciki.\n3. Zaɓi Ƙyale Haɗi a kan kwamfutar.
Hanyoyin Haɗi
Haɗi ta Hanyar Waya
1. Yi amfani da kebul na daidaitattun bayanai don ka haɗa wayar da kwamfutar.\n2. Zaɓi Haɗin Kwamfuta a cikin taga mai fitowa.
Babu memory issashe
An yarda da neman haɗin biyun daga \"%1$s\"?
Tabbata mana Wi-Fi da Bluetooth na kwamfutar suna kunne don amfani da wannan fasalin.
Haɗin NFC
Buɗe mana wayar don amfani %1$s
An soke %1$s
%1$s Ana Buƙatar Haɗin-biyu
Haɗa Allon Waya
Buɗe shafin %1$s na Kwamfutar abokin-hulɗa, sannan duba Lambar-sirri ta QR don haɗawa.
Wanda aka Haɗa Kwanan Nan
Tuna wannan kwamfutar
Yi Sikanin don ka Haɗa
Ba ka na\'urar da kake son ka haɗa ga ita a nan ba?
Gwada mana: %1$s.
Bayan haɗi, za ka iya amfani da fasalai kamar su Duba Alloda Gusar da Fayil ba tare da cin bayanai ba.
Da fatar za\'a kunna Wi-Fi da Bulutoot ɗin a kan kwamfutar da kuke son ku haɗa, kuma buɗe abokin-hulɗar Kwamfutar.
Za ka iya zuwa %1$s don sauke abokin ciniki.
Bayan haɗawa, zaku iya yin amfani da fasullan haɗakar na\'urori da yawa kamar Nuna allo akan wani allo da Taransifar Fayil
ƙi amincewa
Kashe
Kunna
Kwafi da Sauri
An kwafa zuwa ga allon-latsawa na kwamfutar
Aika da Sauri
An ci nasarar aikawa
Ana aika fayiloli %1$d zuwa ga \"%2$s\"
An aika fayil 1 zuwa ga \"%1$s\"
A halin yanzu an na\'ura da ke haɗe ba ta tallafin wanann fasalin
Lokacin Haɗin ya Ƙare: Tabbatar Mana An Saka Abokin Cinikin Kwamfuta
Za ka iya zuwa ga shafin yanar-gizo na www.pcconnection.online don ka sauke kuma ka saka
Lokacin haɗin ya ƙare. Sake haɗa mana na\'urar yadda aka nema.
Lokacin haɗin ya ƙare. Saka mana abokin cinikin kwamfuta da farko
An yi nasarar haɗa \"%1$s\"
Ana shiryawa...
Ana a hade
A ƙyale \"%1$s\" ta haɗa wannan wayar? Taɓa \"Ƙyale\" don aikata wayarka ta hannu daga kwamfuta da gusar da fayiloli.
ƙi amincewa
Ana jira...
Bar mana Bluetooth da Wi-Fi a kunne don aiki na al\'ada na %1$s
Za a naƙasa %1$s ta kai-tsaye a cikin minti(tuna) %2$s
Don amfani da %1$s ko %2$s, tabbata mana an sauke abokin cinikin kwamfuta da ya yi daidai daga %3$s kuma an saka.
Don amfani da %1$s, tabbata mana an sauke abokin cinikin kwamfuta daga %2$s kuma an saka.
Da zarar an haɗa.Za ka iya amfani da Madubin Allo.
Za ka iya gusar da fayiloli tsakanin kwamfutarka da wayarka ba tare da amfani da bayanan wayar hannu ba.
Ana amfani
Haɗin NFC
Da fatar a farko za\'a duba kodai na\'urar wayar hannun ku na karɓar NFC.\nSanya na\'urar hannun wayar ku akan cif ɗin NFC na kwamfutar dake da wannan fasalin don haɗawa.
Ka Da a Sanar
Nuw
Okt
Kawai a Sanar a Yayin Nunawa Kan Wani Allo
Da fatar za\'a buɗe shafin \"Yi Sikanin don ka Haɗa\" akan Kwamfutar abokin-ciniki.
Ja ƙasa don wartsakarwa
Wartsaka ta kammala
Ana wartsakarwa
Sake don wartsakarwa
Da fatar a zaɓi wani lokacin nan-gaba
Kima marar sahihanci
Da fatar a zaɓi lokacin da ya wuce
Da fatar a zaɓi sahihin lokaci
An kai iyakar harafi
Kara
SOKE
YA YI
Soke
A halin-yanzu an haɗa tare da wata na\'ura. Idan ku ka cigaba da kunna Alaƙar Waya, za\'a yanke haɗin tare da na\'urar.
An haɗa %1$s
An Kasa Haɗawa
An kasa haɗawa. Da fatar a gwada kuma.
Haɗa Tare da Waya
Ana raba allo tare da %1$s
Taɓa Sikana a cikin Cibiyar Sarrafawar wayar ku, sannan duba lambar-sirri ta QR da ke sama don haɗawa da kwamfutar hannun.
An haɗa
Ana nunawa a wata na\'ura
Ci Gaba
Yanke
Bulutoot
Kawai ana yin amfani don haɗawa da kwamfutocin hannu da kuma kwamfutoci.
Kamara
Kawai ana yin amfani don haɗa na\'urori ta hanyar yin sikanin lambar QR.
Soke

Maraba da zuwa %1$s! Da zarar an haɗa, kwamfutar hannu ɗin ku za ta yi aiki a matsayin wani allon da aka faɗaɗa domin kwamfutar ku, hakan na bayar da damar yin aiki da allo-biyu sannan da fasalin kwafe-manne a tsakanin-na\'urori, duka ba tare da yin amfani da datar waya ba. Za mu buƙaci izinoni masu zuwa:
Na\'urorin Kusa
Kawai ana yin amfani don binciko kwamfutocin kusa domin hadawa.
Sanarwowi
Kawai ana yin amfani don nuna matsayin haɗawa.
Ba da dama
Sanarwar Mai Amfani
Raba allon wayar ku tare da kwamfutar hannu sannan buɗe tagar duba allo akan kwamfutar hannun.
Na-gaba
Ba a haɗa ba
Da fatar ku haɗa wayar ku da %1$s ga cibiyar sadarwa ɗaya, sannan sai ku sake kunnawa.
Ba\'a Haɗa da Cibiyar Sadarwa Ɗaya ba
Haɗin Kwamfutar Hannu
Alaƙar Waya
Nuna Allon Waya Akan Wani Allo
Nuna Allon Waya a Wata Na\'ura

Nuna allon wayar ku akan wata kwamfutar hannu domin nishaɗantuwa da kallo a babban-allo. Sarrafa wayar ku kai-tsaye daga kwamfutar hannun, duka ba tare da yin amfani da datar waya ba. Ana buƙatar waɗannan izinonin sannan kawai za\'a yi amfani da su ne don kunna fasalin.
Bayar da damam ga manhajar ta yi amfani da waɗannan izinoni kaɗai domin ganowa da haɗawa tare da kamfutocin hannu sannan nuna halin haɗawar.
Haɗin Na\'ura da Nuna Waya Akan Wani Allo
Sake gwadawa
Bayan haɗawa, za\'a samu Ƙaramin Nuna Kwamfuta, kuma zaku iya yin amfani da kwamfutar hannun ku a matsayin wani allon da aka faɗaɗa domin Kwamfutar ku.
An kashe Fasalin Yaɗa Kira da Aka Bayar da Dama akan wayar ku. Da fatar a je ka zuwa Saituna > Haɗa-Na\'ura da Yawa > Haɗa-Allo da Yawa sai a kunna shi don a karɓi sanarwowin kira.
Kilifbod ɗin da Aka Yaɗa
A yayin da an haɗa wayar ku da kwamfutar hannun ku, za ku iya kwafewa da manne rubutu a tsakanin na\'urori. Kwafe abu akan ɗayar na\'urar, sannan manne shi akan waccan.
Na\'urorin da Ake Karɓa
Lura
Hadin Kwamfuta (Nunawa akan Allo Wata Na\'ura da Taransifa Fayil)
Kafin yin amfani da %1$s don faɗaɗa allo, da fatar za\'a tabbatar cewa an shigar da abokin-hulɗar %2$s akan Kwamfutar. Don saukar da abokin-hulɗar, ziyarci %3$s.
A yayin yake kunne, Kwamfutar zata iya nemo na\'urar wayar hannu sannan ta haɗa.
Bayan haɗawa, za\'a samu %1$s, kuma zaku iya yin amfani da kwamfutar hannun ku a matsayin wani allon da aka faɗaɗa domin Kwamfutar ku sannan da aiwatar da wasu abubuwa.

Don yin amfani da %3$s don haɗa na\'urarori, kuna da buƙatar kunna Wi-Fi da Bulutoot sanna da buɗe abokin-hulɗar %1$s akan Kwamfutar, kunna %2$s akan na\'urar wayar hannu, kuma bar allon na\'urar wayar hannun a buɗe kuma a kunne.

Don yin amfani da fasulla masu zuwa, kuna da buƙatar kunna Wi-Fi da Bulutoot akan Kwamfutar da kuma buɗe abokin-hulɗar %1$s. Idan ba\'a shigar da wannan abokin-hulɗar ba akan kwamfuta, ziyarci %2$s don a saukar da kuma shigar dashi.
PC Manager
An ƙi neman
Soke
Sake gwaji
Ana haɗawa, jira mana...
Lokacin jiran ya yi tsayi ba yadda aka tsammata ba. Za ka iya ci gaba da jira ko gwada wata hanya don ka haɗa.
Ƙyale mana haɗawa ta kan abokin cinikin kwamfutar don ci gaba.
Yi Sikanin don ka Haɗa
Sake Duba

Yi amfani da kwamfutar hannun ku a matsayin wani allon da aka ƙara domin Kwamfutar ku. Yi aiki a kan alluna biyu a kowane lokaci, kowane wuri, hakan na ƙara muku sauƙi. Kwamfutar hannun da Kwamfutar suna raba kilifbod, kwafewa a kan ɗayan sannan a manne a kan wancan.

Yi amfani da kwamfutar hannun ku a matsayin wani allon da aka ƙara domin Kwamfutar ku. Yi aiki a kan alluna biyu a kowane lokaci, kowane wuri, hakan na ƙara muku sauƙi. Kwamfutar hannun da Kwamfutar suna raba kilifbod, kwafewa a kan ɗayan sannan a manne a kan wancan.
Kawai anyi amfani ne don nemowa da haɗawa da na\'urorin kusa.
Da fatar za\'a bayar da izinoni duka don yin amfani da Haɗin Kwamfuta.
Da fatar za\'a bayar da izinoni duka don yin amfani da Haɗin Kwamfuta.
Kamara
Soke
Saituna
Bayar da dama ga wannan aikace-aikace don yin amfani da izinoni masu zuwa (domin Haɗin Kwamfuta, taransifar fayil, sannan nuna matakin taransifa kawai).
Izinonin sun haɗa da:
Haɗa Na\'urori sannan Yi Taransifar Fayiloli
Makirufo
Na\'urori da ke kusa
Sanarwowi
Hotuna da Bidiyoyi
Kawai anyi amfani ne don nuna matakin taransifar fayil.
Karanta daga Ma\'ajiyar Waje
Dukan ison fayiloli
Ayyuka akan wayar ba za su katse nunawa akan wani allo ba.
Kunna %1$s domin ƙayataccen nishaɗin amfani da babban-allo. Waɗansu ayyuka akan wayar ba za su katse nunawa akan wani allo ba.
Faɗaɗawa Akan Allo-Mai-Faɗi
Nuna Allon Waya Akan Wani Allo
Buɗe tagar nuna allo a wata na\'ura akan kwamfutar hannu.
Don yi haɗin biyu na na\'urar Matter, yi sikanin mana don samun lambar yin haɗin biyun da farko.
Wannan na\'urar ba ta da tallafi yanzu
Duba QR Code

1. Taɓa Yi Sikanin don ka Haɗa a cikin abokin-hulɗar Kwamfutar don fitowa da Lambar-sirri ta QR.\n2. Shafa zuwa ƙasa daga sama ta gefen damar allon na\'urar wayar hannu don fitowa da Cibiyar Sarrafawa, yi doguwar danna %1$s (%2$s domin kwamfutocin hannu) don zuwa cikin shafin %1$s, taɓa maɓallin Duba ta saman kusurwar dama, sannan duba Lambar-sirri ta QR don haɗawa.
Zaɓi %2$s > Yi Sikanin don ka Haɗa a cikin %1$s, sannan sanya Lambar-sirri ta QR ɗin a tsakanin firem ɗin don duba.
Satumba
Yi catin sannan kalli bidiyoyi a tare ta hanyar fasalin tsaga allo gida biyu.
Soke
An ƙaddamar da motsin Kwafi da Sauri. Je cikin %1$s don haɗa kwamfutar ku, daga nan za ku iya mannewa kai-tsaye akan kwamfutar ku.
An ƙaddamar da motsin Nunawa a Wata Na\'ura. Je cikin %1$s don haɗa kwamfutar ku, daga nan sai a nuna allon wayar ku a kwamfutar, hakan na bayar da damar yaɗa bayanai a tsakanin na\'urori.
An ƙaddamar da motsin Aika da Sauri. Je cikin %1$s don haɗa kwamfutar ku sai ku fara yin taransifar fayilolin da aka zaɓa.
Tafi
Babu Na\'urar da aka Haɗa
Cikin gaggawa kwafe sanna manne zuwa ga kwamfuta ta hanyar taɓi-biyu da Yatsu-uku.
Raba da Gaggawa ta Hanyar Yatsu-Uku
Mannewa da Yatsu-uku
Shafa zuwa gefuna da yatsu-uku don aikawa da zaɓaɓɓun fayiloli zuwa ga kwamfutar da aka haɗa.
Da fatar za\'a fara shigar da abokin-hulɗar Kwamfuta
An kwafe URL.
Da fatar a tabbatar cewa an shigar fa abokin-hulɗar kwamfuta akan kwamfutar, daga nan sake-haɗa kebur ɗin. Mahaɗar saukarwa: %1$s

A yayin da ya ke haɗe da wata cibiyar sadarwar 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi, yin amfani da %1$s na iya haifar da jinkiri. An bayar da shawara a sauya Wi-Fi zuwa rukunin 5 GHz ko a yanke daga Wi-Fi (alhali a kiyaye makunnin Wi-Fi a kunne) don inganta aiki.
Zai yi aiki a yayin da aka haɗa da cibiyar sadarwar Wi-Fi ɗaya
